title: Fix table.rs: use display_width consistently
description: table.rs uses unicode_width::UnicodeWidthStr::width directly in measure_width, wrap_text, pad_cell, break_word. Should use crate::tui::util::display_width for consistency with the rest of the codebase. Latent bug: if display_width and UnicodeWidthStr::width disagree for a code point, table cells overflow their column. Design: ai/design/chat-rendering-enhancements.md
